Full Roster

More Than Just a
Softball Team

Solutions Squad started in 2019 as a group of coworkers and friends who wanted an excuse to get outside. What started as casual fun has grown into a genuine community — a crew that shows up for each other on and off the field.

We play in the Bloomington Recreational Softball League every summer. Whether you're a first-timer or a seasoned player, you'll find a home here.

Our Story

2019

Founded

12

Roster Players

6+

Seasons Played

1

League Title

SOLUTIONS SQUAD

A casual co-ed softball team bringing competitive spirit and good times to the Bloomington recreational league since 2019. Come out and cheer us on!
